key_events: Global markets rebound on easing US-Iran conflict tensions
Asian indices (Nikkei, ASX 200, Kospi) see gains
Crude oil prices show volatility; gold/silver recover after strike pause

key_highlights: Global art market recovered 4% in 2025 to reach US$59.6 billion
Public auction sales increased 9% to US$20.7 billion
2026 outlook cautious; dealers prioritizing established artists amid geopolitical instability
